mapper.select: SELECT Q.qna_id , Q.title , Q.category , Q.question , Q.user_id , Q.answer , Q.answer_id , Q.question_at , Q.answer_at , Q.answer_check , PM.platform_manager_name , EP.employee_name , CP.company_name FROM qna Q LEFT JOIN platform_manager PM ON Q.answer_id = PM.user_id LEFT JOIN employee EP ON Q.user_id = EP.user_id LEFT JOIN company CP ON EP.company_id = CP.company_id WHERE Q.deleted_at IS NULL AND PM.deleted_at IS NULL AND EP.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY Q.question_at DESC

SELECT Q.qna_id , Q.title , Q.category , Q.question , Q.user_id , Q.answer , Q.answer_id , Q.question_at , Q.answer_at , Q.answer_check , PM.platform_manager_name , EP.employee_name , CP.company_name FROM qna Q LEFT JOIN platform_manager PM ON Q.answer_id = PM.user_id LEFT JOIN employee EP ON Q.user_id = EP.user_id LEFT JOIN company CP ON EP.company_id = CP.company_id WHERE Q.deleted_at IS NULL AND PM.deleted_at IS NULL AND EP.deleted_at IS NULL AND Q.qna_id = #{qnaId}

SELECT Q.qna_id , Q.title , Q.category , Q.question , Q.user_id , Q.answer , Q.answer_id , Q.question_at , Q.answer_at , Q.answer_check , PM.platform_manager_name , EP.employee_name , CP.company_name FROM qna Q LEFT JOIN platform_manager PM ON Q.answer_id = PM.user_id LEFT JOIN employee EP ON Q.user_id = EP.user_id LEFT JOIN company CP ON EP.company_id = CP.company_id WHERE Q.deleted_at IS NULL AND PM.deleted_at IS NULL AND EP.deleted_at IS NULL AND Q.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY Q.question_at DESC
